name: Beef Shortrib Xian Bing
steps: Clean and cut the kidney to small cubes about 1cm cube
In a wok, fry off the kidney with oil
Season the kidney with salt, white pepper and blitzed green sichuan pepper. Taste! And adjust
Take the kidney out of the wok, add shao xin wine in to deglaze
In a mixing bowl, add in all ingredients
Break the shortrib a bit, but not entirely
